basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur has released the official notification for 1 Project Manager (Administrative & Communication Officer) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate degree in Communication, Management, Humanities or relevant field to the post & Tasks + 8 years of relevant experience in key responsibilities, Graduate with 12 years of relevant experience at appropriate level in a Govt. organization or educational institute or an organization of repute, Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (knowledge of Hindi preferred), Proven Proficiency in MS Office suite (MS Word, Excel, Power Point), email handling, and document formatting, Knowledge of accounting software (e.g., Tally) is desirable, Strong organizational and multitasking abilities, accuracy in record-keeping
qualification.details: Post-graduate degree in Communication, Management, Humanities or relevant field to the post & Tasks + 8 years of relevant experience in key responsibilities OR Graduate with 12 years of relevant experience at appropriate level in a Govt. organization or educational institute or an organization of repute. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (knowledge of Hindi preferred). Proven Proficiency in MS Office suite (MS Word, Excel, Power Point), email handling, and document formatting. Knowledge of accounting software (e.g., Tally) is desirable. Strong organizational and multitasking abilities, accuracy in record-keeping.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Manager (Administrative & Communication Officer) position at IIT Kanpur is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Manager (Administrative & Communication Officer) in the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Manager role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 29,000 to Rs. 72,200.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post-graduate degree in Communication, Management, Humanities or a relevant field with 8 years of experience, or a Graduate degree with 12 years of relevant experience in a government organization or educational institute.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Manager position will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Kanpur Project Manager recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Manager (Administrative & Communication Officer) at IIT Kanpur is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential skills required for the Project Manager role?
faq.answer: Essential skills include excellent written and verbal communication in English, proficiency in MS Office, strong organizational abilities, and accuracy in record-keeping. Knowledge of Hindi is preferred.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
